heading: PARENT CONTRIBUTING TO NONATTENDANCE
operative_text: If a warning is issued as required by Section 25.095(a), the parent with criminal negligence fails to require the child to attend school as required by law, and the child has absences for the amount of time specified under Section 65.003(a), Family Code, the parent commits an offense.
cross_refs: Code Crim. Proc. ch. 45A, subch. G

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: includes a person standing in parental relation.

_note: Full statute text provided; no truncation. Operative text captures the core offense under subsection (a). Cross references include Family Code §65.003(a), Code of Criminal Procedure Chapter 45A Subchapter G, and Government Code §21.002.
